channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: US gas prices hit an average of $4 a gallon again as the US and Iran launch attacks
item.description: U.S. gas prices have jumped to an average of $4 a gallon again as the U.S. and Iran launch more attacks.

item.title: Social media influencers Andrew and Tristan Tate expected in Miami court
As defaults on student loans surge, millions are trying to get their lives back on track
